name: Picadillo Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, pepper, and garlic in olive oil.
2. Add tomato and cook slowly until well blended.
3. Brown meat in the same skillet and cook slowly with olives, raisins, and capers.
4. Meanwhile, cook rice in stock until done.
5. Mix rice with other ingredients to form a moist but not wet stuffing.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Stuff a 12-15 pound turkey.
